name: Traefik Proxy MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server for Traefik — the cloud-native reverse proxy and load balancer popular in Docker and Kubernetes environments. Enables AI agents to query Traefik routers, services, middlewares, and TLS configuration. Agents can retrieve traffic metrics, monitor upstream health, and inspect Traefik's dynamic configuration.
use_cases: Querying Traefik router and service configuration from infrastructure observability agents
Monitoring backend health and traffic routing from SRE automation agents
Retrieving Traefik middleware configuration from API security audit agents
Inspecting TLS certificate status and renewal from certificate management agents
not_for: Writing Traefik config (MCP is read-focused for Traefik dashboard API)
Complex API management with plugins (use Kong for that)
best_when: A DevOps team running Traefik as their edge proxy wants AI agents to query routing config, monitor backend health, and audit TLS configuration — without manual Traefik dashboard access.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Writing Traefik configuration affects production routing. Configuration changes should go through IaC (Kubernetes manifests, Docker Compose), not direct API.

auth.notes: Traefik dashboard API supports basic auth or TLS client auth. API is primarily read-only for observability. Traefik Enterprise adds RBAC.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Traefik Proxy is free open source; Traefik Hub and Enterprise are paid
pricing.paid_tiers: Traefik Hub API Management; Traefik Enterprise (custom)
pricing.notes: Traefik Proxy is free. Traefik Hub adds API management layer. Enterprise adds advanced security and support.

performance.rate_limits: Dashboard API rate limits not prominently documented

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Traefik manages production edge traffic — config errors route nowhere
Official Traefik MCP from traefik/traefik-mcp — well-maintained
Dashboard API is read-only — config changes must go through IaC, not API
Traefik dashboard API must not be exposed publicly — internal network only
Traefik v2 vs v3 have different API schemas — specify version correctly
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Production edge proxy. Dashboard API must be internal only. Read-only observability recommended. Config changes via IaC only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Edge proxy managing production traffic. Dashboard API is internal-only. TLS termination makes TLS config accuracy critical.
